name: g3p2-save-editor
description: Save editor for The War of Genesis III Part 2.

scripts.dev: npm run build:main && concurrently -k "vite" "wait-on tcp:5173 && electron ."
scripts.build: npm run build:main && tsc -p tsconfig.json && vite build
scripts.web:build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && vite build --mode web --outDir dist/web
